narrative:
Beavercreek 014 (precinct in Greene County) has 858 registered voters, with 44.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.1 percentage points.
